name: flux-llm-kb
description: Global local-first knowledge kernel for Codex and MCP-capable agents.

interface.longDescription: Flux LLM-KB captures, searches, and briefs local interaction, corpus memory, and indexed code through a PostgreSQL/pgvector knowledge kernel, with privacy-aware hooks, kb.code_status, kb.code_search, kb.code_symbol_lookup, and operational dashboard status.
defaultPrompt: Use Flux LLM-KB to retrieve relevant project memory before starting non-trivial work

Use normal kb.brief/search for broad context; broad search/brief excludes code by default, so when broad lookup should return code pass filters={"file_kinds":["code"]} as the only file kind or use kb.code_search / kb.code_symbol_lookup; use separate broad non-code and code-specific calls for mixed context

For code lookup, pass cwd when available. Do not infer root_name from folder names; call kb.code_status(cwd=...) or inspect status roots for the exact configured root_name. Use kb.code_search mode="literal_symbol" for known symbols/paths and mode="full_text" for natural-language terms, stderr fragments, job text, or implementation-body searches
Use Flux LLM-KB for concise redacted durable saves of reusable mid-turn outcomes when decisions, fixes, procedures, commands, or verified project facts should be retrievable before the turn ends
Make final responses indexable for Flux LLM-KB by summarizing decisions, files changed or referenced, commands/tests run, and unresolved gaps without including secrets
